subject: feat(branding): chart line icon + fix maskable generator
body:
Replaced F monogram with rising chart line (dip-then-rise with
endpoint dot) — better represents a finance app, reads clearly
at all sizes. Fixed generate-icons.mjs maskable transform to wrap
all content elements after the background rect, not just <path>.

Tags: branding, icon, pwa
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branding
Semver: minor
